final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among a set of AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition snippet, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to each other
Subject: must include all 7 concepts:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a friendly, approachable direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface treatment — exact paper texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include labels and short definition captions for each concept: "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names verbatim; relationship arrows or connectors between concepts must be clearly legible; layout must be visually approachable and easy to read for a general audience
Avoid:
